---
format: anatomy_breakdown
close_action: save
---

# HOOK
3 carousels hit 100k+ saves last month. they share one structural move.

# SAMPLE 1
@operator-x's "5 hidden costs of agency work". hook was a single shocking dollar amount. body slides each named a cost in 2-line punches.

# SAMPLE 2
@founder-y's "the audit i ran on our funnel". hook was a calendar screenshot. body slides walked the audit step by step with screenshots.

# SAMPLE 3
@builder-z's "what i learned shipping 12 features in 12 weeks". hook was a contradiction. body slides each had one feature with a date and a metric.

# ANALYSIS
all three followed the named-framework move: a 2-3 word phrase in slide 6 that became the quotable line. "hidden costs", "calendar audit", "12-in-12". screenshotable.

# PATTERNS
the named framework lets viewers carry your post into their next conversation. it's the "why we save" trigger. without it, body slides are just paragraphs.

# CTA
save this. before your next carousel: write the 2-3 word framework name in slide 6. if you can't, the carousel isn't ready.
